model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Profile link in the dropdown menu
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (308,151) said dx=257 dy=41 conf=1.00 -> (565,192)
  iter 1: at (565,192) said dx=-65 dy=303 conf=0.90 -> (500,495)
  iter 2: at (532,344) said dx=95 dy=12 conf=0.95 -> (628,356)
  iter 3: at (556,346) said dx=65 dy=2 conf=0.90 -> (621,348)
Call report_offset().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the "Profile" link in the dropdown menu.
The current red crosshair is located at approximately (447, 488).
The "Profile" link is the first item in the menu. It contains an icon and the text "Profile".
The center of the "Profile" link area (including the icon and text) is roughly around (510, 490).

Let's refine the target coordinates for "Profile":
The text "Profile" is centered horizontally in the menu.
The menu box is from x=374 to x=634 (approximately). Center is around 504.
The "Profile" item is the first row. Its vertical center is around y=490.
Wait, looking at the crosshair, it's on the icon part of the Profile link.
Crosshair position (estimated): (447, 488)
Target center of "Profile" link (text + icon): roughly (510, 490)
dx = 510 - 447 = 63
dy = 490 - 488 = 2

Let's re-evaluate.
The red crosshair is at (447, 488).
The "Profile" text starts around x=485. The icon is at x=460.
The center of the "Profile" menu item (from left edge of icon to right edge of text) would be around x=505.
y-coordinate of the "Profile" item is around 490.
dx = 505 - 447 = 58
dy = 490 - 488 = 2

Actually, looking closer at the image:
Crosshair is at (447, 488).
The center of the "Profile" link (including icon and text) is around x=508, y=492.
dx = 508 - 447 = 61
dy = 492 - 488 = 4

Confidence should be high.
